subcodes.first_line: O ye ancient friends of God! That beauteous city hath, from the dawn of guidance, been set ablaze with the fire of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران دیرین الهی آن بلده رعنا از بدایت سطوع نور هدی بنار محبت الله بر
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
